description: Curated catalog of Dota 2 custom-game development tools, libraries and references.

tools.name: Workshop Tools (DLC)
tools.description: Free Valve DLC that unlocks all Source 2 authoring tools for Dota 2. Required for any custom game. Launch via Steam > Dota 2 > 'Launch Dota 2 - Tools', or dota2.exe -tools.

tools.name: Hammer
tools.description: Source 2 level/map editor. Build and compile custom maps (.vmap -> .vpk).

tools.name: Particle Editor (PET)
tools.description: Author and edit particle systems (.vpcf).

tools.name: Material Editor (MET)
tools.description: Create and edit materials (.vmat).

tools.name: ModelDoc Editor
tools.description: Compile and configure models (.vmdl) with attachments, animations, hitboxes.

tools.name: Asset Browser
tools.description: Browse, import and compile addon content assets.

tools.name: VConsole2
tools.description: Source 2 developer console (game/bin/win64/vconsole2.exe). Attaches to a -tools game; live console output and commands. This MCP speaks its protocol for the debug-loop tools.

tools.name: resourcecompiler.exe
tools.description: CLI compiler that turns content/ source assets into compiled game/ files. Used by the addon_compile_content MCP tool.

tools.name: TypeScript Addon Template
tools.description: The canonical ModDota starter: TypeScript -> Lua (tstl) for vscripts + TypeScript for Panorama, with build/launch scripts. The target this MCP is template-aware for.

tools.name: @moddota/dota-lua-types
tools.description: TypeScript declarations for the Dota 2 VScript (Lua) API, used by typescript-to-lua projects.

tools.name: @moddota/panorama-types
tools.description: TypeScript declarations for the Panorama JS API. This MCP bundles a searchable form of these as the Panorama API tools.

tools.name: @moddota/dota-data
tools.description: Auto-generated machine-readable dumps of the Dota 2 VScript API, enums, and Panorama data. This MCP bundles its api.json/enums.json for the lua_api tools.

tools.name: @moddota/find-steam-app
tools.description: Locate an installed Steam app (e.g. 'dota 2 beta') cross-platform. Used by the TS template's install/launch scripts.

tools.name: AbilityLuaSpellLibrary
tools.description: Community library of ready-made Lua ability/modifier implementations to learn from and reuse.

tools.name: typescript-to-lua (tstl)
tools.description: Transpiles TypeScript to Lua. The vscripts build step in the TS template.

tools.name: D2VDump
tools.description: Dota 2 server VScript API dumper — the upstream source of the API data.

tools.name: ModDota/API
tools.description: Documents the interfaces relevant to Dota 2 modding; renders at docs.moddota.com.

tools.name: Dota 2 ModKit
tools.description: GUI helper for KV tooling, localization generation, VPK packing and more.

tools.name: dota-tutorial
tools.description: A full custom-game tutorial project — a large real-world TypeScript addon to study.

tools.name: Dota2AIFramework
tools.description: Framework for building and running Dota 2 AI competitions.

tools.name: moddota.com
tools.description: Community guides for scripting, abilities, panorama, assets and tools. This MCP bundles these articles for the docs_* tools.

tools.name: docs.moddota.com
tools.description: Auto-generated API documentation (VScript + Panorama).

tools.name: Valve Developer Community (Dota 2)
tools.description: Official Source 2 / Dota 2 Workshop Tools wiki.

tools.name: source2.wiki
tools.description: Community-maintained Source 2 engine-tools reference (ResourceCompiler, VConsole, etc.).

tools.name: dota2-workshop-mcp
tools.description: This MCP server: KeyValues tooling, scaffolding, VScript + Panorama API search, bundled docs, and a VConsole2 debug loop.
